events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: burned/corroded meter jaws is a **fail**, **critical** risk — indicative of a high-resistance connection causing arcing/overheating at the service entrance (a fire/shock hazard), non-compliant with NEC Art. 230 service equipment integrity requirements. Recommended actions include de-energizing/lockout, utility notification, jaw/socket replacement, and re-inspection before acceptance.
